user.title: Find Medisana BS430
user.description: Wake the scale by completing a weighing, keep VitaDock disconnected, then submit to search again.

confirm.title: Add Medisana BS430
confirm.description: Set up the discovered scale {name} at {address}.

data_description.name: The name used for this scale in Home Assistant.

error.device_not_found: The scale was not found. Complete a weighing and try again while the scale is still awake.

abort.no_discovery_info: Bluetooth discovery information is no longer available.
